title: History – Techno Brain
content:
Page: History – Techno Brain
URL: https://www.technobraingroup.com/history/

2018
Our India & Kenya Research and Development centers are Reappraised at CMMI level 5-the only

Company in sub-saharan Africa to achieve CMMI level 5 status

Techno Brain Group introduces Diital business.

Opens Microsoft Testing Center,1st in Africa
2017
Expands to new Geographies like Liberia,Sierra Leon.
2016
Bags a new deal from AIR-India's national carrier - $2.8 Million.

Certified ISO 27001:2013 and ISO 9001:2015 by Bureau Veritas.

Microsoft's Country Partner of the Year for Tanzania.

Microsoft's WECA Awards for Development Partner in 2016 WPC Conference.
2015
Our India Research & Development center is appraised at CMMI Level 5.
2014
Techno Brain moves into new Corporate Headquarters in Nairobi, Kenya.
2012
Techno Brain achieves Cisco Selected Certified Partner Status.

Techno Brain Tanzania Training Division achieves Oracle Authorized Training Centre status.
2011
Techno Brain achieves CMMI Maturity Level 3.

Ken-Tech Data Ltd is officially rebranded as Techno Brain BPO / ITES.
2009
Techno Brain becomes a Microsoft Gold Certified Partner.
2006
Techno Brain becomes a Microsoft Gold Certified Partner.
2005
Techno Brain becomes Microsoft Dynamics Nav partner.
2003
Techno Brain signs up with New Horizons as a master franchise for 6 countries in Africa. Commences new operations in Zambia and Malawi.
2002
Techno Brain becomes the largest training provider in the region for producing maximum number of Microsoft, Oracle and Linux professionals.
2001
Techno Brain bags the first software development award to develop agriculture database for Ministry of Agriculture, Tanzania.
2000
Techno Brain becomes Certified Partner.
1999
Techno Brain expands training operations in Nairobi, Kenya.

Techno Brain becomes Oracle Education Partner.

Techno Brain bags the largest training order from Tanzania Breweries Ltd, as an IT Training partner.
1998
Techno Brain becomes first company in the region to introduce Microsoft Certification.
1997
Techno Brain starts operations by setting up a state-of-the-art training institution at Dar-es-Salaam.
